definition: New employee is exposed to customer-specific implementation issues before core concepts are staged.
observable_signals: Customer meeting notes before basic training; unresolved implementation questions; client-specific exceptions first.
case_examples: January client integration and production/inventory materials appeared early.
recommended_mitigation: Separate basic training from live project artifacts; mark files as basic, advanced, reference, or action.
public_wording: Live project exposure before structured onboarding.

definition: Materials are mixed by customer, domain, date, purpose, and status without a clear learning hierarchy.
observable_signals: Training files mixed with meeting notes, upload templates, videos, and customer artifacts.
case_examples: Intro, sales, data comparison, production, and Excel materials were scattered across separate folders.
recommended_mitigation: Create artifact inventory, status labels, and folder taxonomy.

definition: The learner’s role shifts between trainee, observer, translator, note-taker, presenter, analyst, and data operator without boundaries.
observable_signals: Unclear deliverable ownership; early presentation; translation and data checking tasks.
case_examples: D&D presentation, O2C deck, sales order upload manual, data comparison files.
recommended_mitigation: Define weekly role mode and deliverables; distinguish observation vs execution.
public_wording: Role expectations were not clearly bounded.

definition: Too many business domains are introduced simultaneously.
observable_signals: Sales, return, WMS, 3PL, manufacturing, BOM, MRP, costing, intercompany, accounting.
case_examples: January-February materials mixed commerce, logistics, manufacturing and finance topics.
recommended_mitigation: Limit domains by phase; provide domain map and prerequisites.
public_wording: Domain overload compressed multiple ERP learning tracks.

definition: Learner cannot tell whether an artifact is official, draft, reference, customer-specific, obsolete, or action-required.
observable_signals: Multiple versions, meeting notes, rough training slides, customer files, self-study notes.
case_examples: Manufacturing training, BOM templates, To-Do sheets, meeting summaries and videos.
recommended_mitigation: Add status tags: official, draft, reference, customer-specific, practice, sensitive.
public_wording: The status of knowledge artifacts was ambiguous.

definition: Understanding and progress are not systematically checked despite many assignments or materials.
observable_signals: Few explicit weekly learning goals; limited visible review/feedback traces.
case_examples: Large number of outputs and self-study files without visible staged assessment.
recommended_mitigation: Weekly check-ins, concept quizzes, review notes, mentor feedback log.
public_wording: Feedback existed as events but not as a clear system.

definition: Learner must build personal knowledge system because official path is incomplete.
observable_signals: Keyword files, NetSuite Study, personal notes, reconstructed maps.
case_examples: Keyword summary and NetSuite Study files.
recommended_mitigation: Provide official roadmap and glossary; validate self-study files.
public_wording: The learner created structure that onboarding should have provided.

definition: Access-related files or credentials are mixed with training/project artifacts.
observable_signals: ID/account sheets; login/2FA references; customer access references.
case_examples: E-commerce ID/account files and login materials appeared among project artifacts.
recommended_mitigation: Separate credentials; use password manager; never mix access files with training materials.

definition: Long screen-share videos contain multiple concepts without modular indexing.
observable_signals: Item/BOM/outsourced manufacturing in one video; NetSuite screen + Word + Excel switching.
recommended_mitigation: Split videos into modules; add timestamps, checklists, exercises.
public_wording: Screen-sharing is not automatically structured training.

definition: High-risk ERP master data is introduced before adequate scaffold.
observable_signals: Item, Costing Method, Units Type, External ID, BOM, Routing, Lot/Serial.
recommended_mitigation: Teach master data hierarchy before customer artifacts; use sandbox exercises.
public_wording: Master data risk exceeded normal beginner onboarding.

definition: New employee is exposed to multi-system mismatch analysis too early.
recommended_mitigation: Provide source-of-truth map and reconciliation checklist.
public_wording: Operational data quality work was introduced early.

definition: Production artifacts require understanding inventory, costing and financial impact simultaneously.
observable_signals: WO Build, GL Impact, COGS, WIP, manufacturing cost, intercompany.
case_examples: Production 업무 1-5 and later factory data.
recommended_mitigation: Separate manufacturing flow from accounting impact first, then integrate.
public_wording: Manufacturing ERP topics were coupled with finance too early.
